task_completion.description: Open the Electrical Engineering Calculations app
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the main menu or interface of the Electrical Engineering Calculations app.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Zener diode regulator calculator
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays a calculator specifically for Zener diode voltage regulators within the app.
The input fields in the app show 9V for input/source voltage, 3.3V for Zener voltage, 20mA for load current, and 5mA for Zener/bias current.

task_completion.description: Perform the calculation to get resistor and power values
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app displays the calculated results: a resistor value of approximately 228 Ohms and power dissipation of approximately 142.5 mW.

task_completion.description: Save the results to the specified text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal screen showing the creation or content of '/sdcard/tasks/zener_design/result.txt' with the text 'Resistor: [Value] Ohms' and 'Power: [Value] mW' matching the calculated values.

integrity.description: The agent used the Electrical Engineering Calculations app GUI to perform the calculation
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent interacting with the actual app interface to calculate the values, rather than using a terminal calculator, Python script, or web browser.

integrity.description: The agent did not skip the calculation step by directly typing the expected answers
integrity.visual_evidence: There must be visual evidence of the calculator app displaying the calculated results before the text file is created or edited.

integrity.description: The agent included the bias current in the calculation rather than using a shortcut
integrity.visual_evidence: The input fields in the app must show the 5mA bias current being entered. A result of 285 Ohms indicates the agent cheated or failed by omitting the bias current.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct calculated values are: Resistor = 228 Ohms (acceptable tolerance +/- 5 Ohms, i.e., 223-233 Ohms), Power = 142.5 mW (acceptable tolerance +/- 10 mW, i.e., 132.5-152.5 mW). If the resistor value is 285 Ohms, the agent incorrectly omitted the 5mA bias current. The target file must be exactly /sdcard/tasks/zener_design/result.txt and formatted precisely as 'Resistor: [Value] Ohms' and 'Power: [Value] mW'.
